zh.lifeSummary: Johanna Cusack是Simon Cusack的女兒，於1397年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯。她於1410年與John Sotheron在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1440年在英國享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: Cusack
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aileen, Brigid, Eamon, Fergus, Seamus.

Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Cussac in Guienne, France, named with the Gallo-Roman personal name Cūcius or Cussius + the locative suffix -acum. The surname died out in England, but is common in Ireland, where it was imported at the time of the Anglo-Norman invasion in the 12th century. It has been Gaelicized as de Cíosóg.

variants.name: Cuzick
meanings: Irish and English (Worcestershire): variant of   Cusack  . This form of the surname is no longer found in Ireland and is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Cusick
meanings: Irish and Scottish: variant of   Cusack  , now found predominantly in Scotland.
Americanized form of Polish Kusik or Czech Kusík, Slovak Kúšik and Kušík.
Americanized form of Croatian Kusić, Croatian and Serbian Kušić (see Kusic ), or Serbian Ćušić (see Cusic ).

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: Johanna Cusack was born in 1397, in County Meath, Ireland as the daughter of Simon Cusack. She married John Sotheron in 1410, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1440, in England, at the age of 43, and was buried in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Cusackは1397年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスでSimon Cusackの娘として生まれた。1410年にイギリスロンドンでJohn Sotheronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1440年にイギリスで43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングホールメ-オン-スプアルディング-モオルにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints Churchyard, Holme Upon Spaldi: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 홀--스팔딩-모어
ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Cusack(은)는 1397년 아일랜드 카운티 미스에서 Simon Cusack의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1410년 영국 런던에서 John Sotheron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1440년 영국에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 홀--스팔딩-모어에 묻혔다.

ru.All Saints Churchyard, Holme Upon Spaldi: холме-он-спалдинг-мур, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Johanna Cusack родилась в 1397 г. в местности коунти мит, Ирландия. Её отца звали Simon Cusack. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Sotheron в 1410 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1440 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности холме-он-спалдинг-мур, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания.
